introSection: Big Red Boat Coaster is a steel kiddie powered coaster located at Dreamworld in Queensland, Australia.

sections.title: History
sections.content: The attraction opened on 23 December 2023, with a grand opening being held the day before, with all members of The Wiggles making an appearance.

fullText:
Big Red Boat Coaster is a steel kiddie powered coaster located at Dreamworld in Queensland, Australia.

The attraction opened on 23 December 2023, with a grand opening being held the day before, with all members of The Wiggles making an appearance.
